Headline: #3 King Drive Temporary Reroute at King Drive/58th
ShortDescription: 3 King Drive buses are temporarily rerouted via King Drive, 59th, Prairie, Garfield and King Drive: due to, fire department activity near King Drive/58th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How will this affect my trip?

 

#3 King Drive buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via King Drive, 59th, Prairie, Garfield, King Drive and over regular route: due to, fire department activity near King Drive/58th.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: 47 47th Temporary Westbound Reroute near 47th/Kedzie
ShortDescription: Westbound 47 47th buses are temporarily rerouted via Kedzie, 51st, California and 47th: due to, street blockage near 47th/Kedzie.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How will this affect my trip?

 

Westbound #47 47th buses are temporarily rerouted via Kedzie, 51st, California, 47th and over regular route: due to, street blockage near 47th/Kedzie.
